detaileddescription.para:
Constructor
aDatastore
Pointer to datastore
aNamespace
Namespace key (e.g "/namespace")

Equality operator
true if equal otherwise, it returns false.

Equality operator
true if NOT equal otherwise, it returns false.

Get full path to CID key. Path format: /namespace/topic/cid
topic
Topic namespace.
aCid
Content identifier.
full path to CID key as HierarchicalKey or outcome::failure on error

Check if CID is among the current heads.
aCid
Content identifier
topic
Topic namespace
true is CID is head, false otherwise

Check if CID is head and return it height if it is
aCid
Content identifier
topic
Topic namespace
Height of head or outcome::failure on error

Get current number of heads
length, current number of heads or outcome::failure on error

Add head CID to datastore with full namespace
aCid
Content identifier
aHeight
height of head
topic
Topic namespace
outcome::failure on error

memberdef.argsstring: (const CID &aCidHead, const CID &aNewHeadCid, uint64_t aHeight, const std::string &topic)
memberdef.name: Replace

detaileddescription.para:
Replace a head with a new cid.
aCidHead
Content identifier of head to replace
aNewHeadCid
Content identifier of new head
aHeight
height of head
topic
Topic namespace
outcome::failure on error

Returns the list of current heads plus the max height.
topics
Topic to get list from
outcome::failure on error

primeCache builds the heads cache based on what's in storage; since it is called from the constructor only we don't bother locking.
outcome::failure on error

memberdef.argsstring: (storage::BufferBatch &aDataStore, const CID &aCid, uint64_t aHeight, const std::string &topic) const
memberdef.name: Write

detaileddescription.para:
Write data to datastore in batch mode
aDataStore
Pointer to datastore batch
aCid
Content identifier to add
aHeight
height of CID head
topic
Topic namespace
outcome::failure on error

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::unique_ptr< storage::BufferBatch > &aDataStore, const CID &aCid, const std::string &topic) const
memberdef.name: Delete

detaileddescription.para:
Delete data from datastore in batch mode
aDataStore
Pointer to datastore batch
aCid
Content identifier to remove
topic
Topic namespace

briefdescription.para: CrdtHeads manages the current Merkle-CRDT heads.
